title: Rename getCfg to loadConfig across modules

grade.command: node -e "Promise.all([import('./config.mjs'),import('./app.mjs')]).then(([c,a])=>{if(typeof c.loadConfig!=='function')throw new Error('missing loadConfig');if(c.getCfg!==undefined)throw new Error('getCfg still exported');if(a.retries()!==3)throw new Error('app broken');console.log('ok')})"
